methods.name: cancel
methods.desc:
deletes the application & returns the mbr + asset
to the seller IF the auction hasn't started

returns.desc: a boolean of whether the auction is live
a boolean of whether the address has bid in the auction

methods.name: optin

args.name: asset
args.desc: The asset to be opted into

methods.desc: optin tells the contract to opt into an asa

isPrizeBox.desc: whether or not the prize is an asset or a prize box

prizeClaimed.desc: whether the prize has been claimed

bidAsset.desc: the asset that is being used for bidding in the auction

bidFee.desc: the percentage fee to take for the raffle on each bid in hundreds to support two decimals

startingBid.desc: the starting amount to begin bids at

bidMinimumIncrease.desc: the smallest amount each new bid need increment the auction price

startTimestamp.desc: the unix time that the auction starts on

endTimestamp.desc: the round that the auction ends on

creatorRoyalty.desc: the royalty percentage the creator will get for the auction

marketplace.desc:
The address of the marketplace that created the auction to send the fee to

IMPORTANT: this is a double sided marketplace fee contract
the marketplace referred to internally in the contract
is the listing side marketplace.
the buyer side marketplace provides their address at
the time of purchase

marketplaceRoyalties.desc: the royalty percentage each side of the market will take for the auction

gateID.desc: the gate ID to use to check if the user is qualified to bid in the auction

vrfFailureCount.desc: counter for how many times we've failed to get rng from the beacon

refundCount.desc: the number of bids that have been refunded

bidTotal.desc: the total sum of all bids

weightedBidTotal.desc: the total sum of all highest bids

highestBid.desc: highest bid the contract has received thus far

bidID.desc: the id or index of the last bid

raffleAmount.desc: the total amount collected for the loser raffle

rafflePrizeClaimed.desc: whether the raffle winner has claimed their prize

uniqueAddressCount.desc:
we count how many unique addresses bid so we can
properly get each bids % of the total bid amount

weightsBoxCount.desc: the number of boxes allocated to tracking weights

weightTotals.desc: totals for each box of weights for our skip list

findWinnerCursors.desc:
cursors to track iteration of finding winner
index being for the bid iteration
amountIndex being the index for the amount of the bids seen

refundMBRCursor.desc: cursor to track iteration of MBR refunds

winningTicket.desc:
we get the winning number from the randomness beacon
after the auction ends & we have ran findWinner
to compile our list

raffleWinner.desc: the winning address of the raffle

raffleRound.desc:
the round captured when raffle() is first called after auction ends
used for VRF since round times are dynamic and we need a deterministic round

akitaDAOEscrow.desc: the named DAO escrow this contract routes fees to (name + app)

version.desc: the current version of the contract

akitaDAO.desc: the app ID of the Akita DAO

bids.desc: the list of bids in the auction

bidsByAddress.desc:
when we run our raffle we need to transform
our list of bids into an address based box

locations.desc: the addresses associated with highest bid locations

sourceInfo.errorMessage: index access is out of bounds
invalid number of bytes for arc4.bool
invalid number of bytes for arc4.dynamic_array<arc4.uint8>
invalid number of bytes for arc4.static_array<arc4.uint8, 32>
invalid number of bytes for arc4.uint64
invalid number of bytes for bytes
invalid number of bytes for uint64
invalid tail pointer at index 0 of ((len+utf8[]),uint64)
invalid tail pointer at index 1 of (uint64,((len+utf8[]),uint64))
